languages.text: "То, что оно функционирует — само по себе является феноменом, но феноменом зловещим. Я бы предложил отступить, Вольный Торговец". {n}Эоганн покрепче смыкает мехадендрит на рукояти оружия.{/n}
"The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}
languages.original_text: "То, что оно функционирует — само по себе является феноменом, но феноменом зловещим. Я бы предложил отступить, Вольный Торговец". {n}Эоганн покрепче смыкает мехадендрит на рукояти оружия.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite upon the grip of his weapon.{/n}
"The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite upon the grip of his weapon.{/n}
"The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}
"The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}

languages.text: «El hecho de que funcione es un fenómeno más que siniestro. Comerciante Independiente, recomiendo una retirada inmediata». {n}Eogunn aprieta con más fuerza la mecadendrita que sostiene su arma.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «El hecho de que funcione es un fenómeno más que siniestro. Comerciante Independiente, recomiendo una retirada inmediata». {n}Eogunn aprieta con más fuerza la mecadendrita que sostiene su arma.{/n}

languages.text: “它居然还能运作，这本身就是异常现象，而且十分不祥。我建议立刻撤退，行商浪人。”{n}伊奥贡的机械触须紧紧握住了武器的握柄。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “它居然还能运作，这本身就是异常现象，而且十分不祥。我建议立刻撤退，行商浪人。”{n}伊奥贡的机械触须紧紧握住了武器的握柄。{/n}

languages.text: "Der Umstand, dass es funktioniert ist ein Phänomen, aber kein unheilvolles. Wir sollten uns zurückziehen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Eogunn umfasst den Griff seiner Waffe mit seinem Mechdendriten noch fester.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Der Umstand, dass es funktioniert ist ein Phänomen, aber kein unheilvolles. Wir sollten uns zurückziehen, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin}." {n}Eogunn umfasst den Griff seiner Waffe mit seinem Mechdendriten noch fester.{/n}

languages.text: « Le fait que cette chose demeure opérationnelle est un phénomène aussi étrange qu'effroyable. Je serais d'avis de battre en retraite, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. » {n}Eogunn resserre sa mécadendrite sur la poignée de son arme.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Le fait que cette chose demeure opérationnelle est un phénomène aussi étrange qu'effroyable. Je serais d'avis de battre en retraite, {mf|libre-marchand|libre-marchande}. » {n}Eogunn resserre sa mécadendrite sur la poignée de son arme.{/n}

languages.text: "Çalışır durumda olması bir fenomen ancak uğursuz bir fenomen. Geri çekilmemizi tavsiye ederim Hür Tacir." {n}Eogunn, mekadentritini silahının kabzasına sıkıca sarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Çalışır durumda olması bir fenomen ancak uğursuz bir fenomen. Geri çekilmemizi tavsiye ederim Hür Tacir." {n}Eogunn, mekadentritini silahının kabzasına sıkıca sarıyor.{/n}

languages.text: 「稼働しているという事実こそ現象だが、不吉な現象だ。撤退することを勧める、ローグトレーダー。」{n}イオグンはメカデンドライトを武器のグリップに締め付ける。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The fact that it is operational is a phenomenon, but an ominous one. I advise we retreat, Rogue Trader." {n}Eogunn tightens his mechadendrite around the grip of his weapon.{/n}
